synced:
[00:06.94] I didn't think you'd understand me
[00:12.25] 
[00:14.84] How could you ever even try?
[00:20.16] 
[00:22.89] I don't wanna tiptoe, but I don't wanna hide
[00:27.19] But I don't wanna feed this monstrous fire
[00:31.85] Just wanna let this story die
[00:36.04] And I'll be alright
[00:38.61] We can't be friends
[00:41.73] But I'd like to just pretend
[00:46.06] You cling to your papers and pens
[00:50.05] Wait until you like me again
[00:54.25] Wait for your love
[00:57.00] Love, I'll wait for your love
[01:01.52] 
[01:04.66] Me and my truth, we sit in silence
[01:10.04] 
[01:12.70] Baby girl, it's just me and you
[01:17.97] 
[01:20.59] 'Cause I don't wanna argue, but I don't wanna bite
[01:25.16] My tongue, yeah, I think I'd rather die
[01:29.78] You got me misunderstood, but at least I look this good
[01:36.67] We can't be friends
[01:39.72] But I'd like to just pretend
[01:43.72] You cling to your papers and pens
[01:47.97] Wait until you like me again
[01:52.06] Wait for your love
[01:55.14] Love, I'll wait for your love
[01:59.46] I'll wait for your love
[02:03.11] Love, I'll wait for your love
[02:08.76] Know that you made me
[02:12.68] I don't like how you paint me, yet I'm still here hanging
[02:17.06] Not what you made me
[02:20.95] It's something like a daydream
[02:23.53] But I feel so seen in the night
[02:27.84] So for now, it's only me
[02:31.90] And maybe that's all I need
[02:34.68] We can't be friends
[02:37.54] But I'd like to just pretend
[02:41.89] You cling to your papers and pens
[02:45.93] Wait until you like me again
[02:50.28] Wait for your love
[02:52.91] Love, I'll wait for your love
[02:57.66] I'll wait for your love
[03:01.45] Love, I'll wait for your love
[03:06.66] I'll wait for your love
[03:10.12] I'll wait for your love
[03:14.75] I'll wait for your love
[03:18.83] I'll wait for your love
[03:22.92] I'll wait for your love
[03:24.08]
plain:
I didn't think you'd understand me

How could you ever even try?

I don't wanna tiptoe, but I don't wanna hide
But I don't wanna feed this monstrous fire
Just wanna let this story die
And I'll be alright

We can't be friends
But I'd like to just pretend
You cling to your papers and pens
Wait until you like me again

Wait for your love
Love, I'll wait for your love

Me and my truth, we sit in silence

Baby girl, it's just me and you

'Cause I don't wanna argue, but I don't wanna bite
My tongue, yeah, I think I'd rather die
You got me misunderstood, but at least I look this good

We can't be friends
But I'd like to just pretend
You cling to your papers and pens
Wait until you like me again

Wait for your love
Love, I'll wait for your love
I'll wait for your love
Love, I'll wait for your love

Know that you made me
I don't like how you paint me, yet I'm still here hanging
Not what you made me
It's something like a daydream
But I feel so seen in the night
So for now, it's only me
And maybe that's all I need

We can't be friends
But I'd like to just pretend
You cling to your papers and pens
Wait until you like me again

Wait for your love
Love, I'll wait for your love
I'll wait for your love
Love, I'll wait for your love

I'll wait for your love
I'll wait for your love
I'll wait for your love
I'll wait for your love
I'll wait for your love
